name: Security Guard Attendance Form Review
description: Review filled-and-signed security guard attendance forms (Form Daftar Hadir Satpam). Uses IBM granite-docling-258M to extract printed text, detect handwritten field values, and locate the guard's signature. Documents missing the guard signature or with no handwritten content are auto-rejected.

fields.name: guard_name
fields.description: Full name of the security guard on duty

fields.name: post_location
fields.description: Building / post location (e.g., Gate A, Lobby, Parking)

fields.name: shift_type
fields.description: Shift (morning / afternoon / night, or pagi / siang / malam)

fields.name: check_in_time
fields.description: Time the guard started the shift

fields.name: check_out_time
fields.description: Time the guard ended the shift

fields.name: incidents_observed
fields.description: Notes / incidents recorded during the shift

fields.name: guard_signature_present
fields.description: Whether the guard signature was detected by the multimodal model

fields.name: supervisor_signature_present
fields.description: Whether a supervisor counter-signature was detected

fields.name: handwritten_field_count
fields.description: Number of fields detected as handwritten on the form

validation_rules.description: Guard signature must be present on the form. Form is REJECTED if no signature is detected.
Form must be filled in by hand. At least 3 handwritten field values must be detected.
Attendance date must be filled in.
Shift start time must be filled in.
Shift end time must be filled in.
Post / building location must be filled in.

action_triggers.description: Mark form as APPROVED when signature + handwriting + required fields all pass
Auto-reject the form when any rejection-severity rule fails (missing signature or no handwriting)
Notify supervisor to chase the guard for signature

nl_prompt: Extract every printed and handwritten field from this security guard attendance form (Form Daftar Hadir Satpam). Identify: guard name, guard ID, post / building location, shift (pagi / siang / malam / morning / afternoon / night), attendance date, check-in time, check-out time, any incidents observed, supervisor name. For each field, indicate whether the value was handwritten or printed. Detect the guard signature and supervisor signature (if present) — return the bounding box and a flag. Count the number of handwritten field values found. The form is only valid if (a) the guard signature is present and (b) at least 3 fields were filled in by hand. Return all values exactly as they appear in the original document (Indonesian or English).
